description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The back is a smooth, light gray surface featuring a prominent, centered black Apple logo and a dual camera module with two lenses and a flash in the top left corner. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with a black bezel and a notch at the top, showing a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, white, pink, and purple hues. The sides are slim and metallic, with subtle button placements visible along the edges. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable feel. Its overall design is minimalist and highly recognizable, suitable for everyday use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, light gray Apple smartphone with a dual camera on the back and a vibrant, full-screen display on the front. The device features a minimalist design with a smooth glass and metal finish.
description_view_0: Back view showing the light gray surface, centered black Apple logo, and dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim profile and subtle button placements along the side.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful abstract wallpaper and a notch at the top.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the thin metallic side and possible button placements.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible against the light gray surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, white, pink, and purple curved shapes. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged in a triangular layout within a raised square module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible along the left and right edges, likely including a volume rocker and power button.
